_comment: PUNK Multiverse dedicated coordinator. CUSTOM Wine image (not stock steamcmd) - PUNK is a Steam playtest and cannot be fetched by SteamCMD; the operator supplies the game files. See pelican_egg/README.md.
name: PUNK Multiverse
author: omarsanchezdev@gmail.com
description: Dedicated headless coordinator for PUNK Multiverse (the co-op mod for PUNK). Runs the Windows game under Wine with the LiteNetLib 'Udp' transport - no Steam required. Game files are operator-supplied (PUNK is a Steam playtest, not SteamCMD-downloadable).

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# PUNK Multiverse install script.
#
# IMPORTANT: PUNK is a Steam *playtest* (appid 2850470). Playtest depots are NOT downloadable
# with `steamcmd +login anonymous`, so - unlike a normal games-steamcmd egg - this install does
# NOT fetch the game. Provide the files one of two ways:
#   (A) Set GAME_FILES_URL to a zip/tar of your modded install; this script downloads+extracts it.
#   (B) Leave it blank and upload the files to the server root via the panel File Manager / SFTP.
set -e
apt -y update
apt -y --no-install-recommends install curl tar unzip xz-utils ca-certificates findutils
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ -n "${GAME_FILES_URL}" ]; then
    echo "Downloading game files from ${GAME_FILES_URL}"
    TMP=/tmp/punkmv-game.archive
    curl -sSL -o "${TMP}" "${GAME_FILES_URL}"
    case "${GAME_FILES_URL}" in
        *.zip)           unzip -o "${TMP}" -d /mnt/server ;;
        *.tar.gz|*.tgz)  tar -xzf "${TMP}" -C /mnt/server ;;
        *.tar.xz)        tar -xJf "${TMP}" -C /mnt/server ;;
        *.tar)           tar -xf  "${TMP}" -C /mnt/server ;;
        *) echo "Unknown archive type; left ${TMP} in place for manual handling" ;;
    esac
    rm -f "${TMP}"
    # If the archive wrapped everything in one top-level folder, flatten so Punk.exe is at root.
    if [ ! -f /mnt/server/Punk.exe ]; then
        DIR=$(find /mnt/server -maxdepth 3 -name Punk.exe -printf '%h\n' 2>/dev/null | head -n1)
        if [ -n "${DIR}" ] && [ "${DIR}" != "/mnt/server" ]; then
            echo "Flattening ${DIR} -> /mnt/server"
            cp -a "${DIR}/." /mnt/server/
        fi
    fi
fi

if [ -f /mnt/server/Punk.exe ]; then
    echo "OK: Punk.exe present."
    if [ -d /mnt/server/BepInEx ]; then echo "OK: BepInEx present."; else echo "WARNING: BepInEx/ missing - the mod is not installed in this copy."; fi
else
    echo "======================================================================"
    echo " No Punk.exe found yet."
    echo " Upload your modded PUNK install to the server root: Punk.exe, BepInEx/,"
    echo " Punk_Data/, MonoBleedingEdge/, winhttp.dll, doorstop_config.ini, and the"
    echo " .doorstop_version file. See pelican_egg/README.md for the full list."
    echo "======================================================================"
fi
echo "Install step complete."

variables.name: Game Files URL
variables.description: Optional. A direct URL to a .zip / .tar.gz / .tar.xz of your MODDED PUNK install (folder containing Punk.exe + BepInEx). Downloaded and extracted at install time. Leave blank to upload the files yourself via File Manager / SFTP. PUNK is a Steam playtest and CANNOT be fetched by SteamCMD.

variables.name: Game Executable
variables.description: Windows executable to launch, relative to the game directory.

variables.name: Game Directory
variables.description: Absolute path to the game install inside the container. Leave as default unless the files are nested in a subfolder.

variables.name: Advertised Address
variables.description: Host address written into the join code shown to players (host:port). Informational - the server binds all interfaces on the allocation port regardless. Set to your public IP/DNS to make the in-game code copy-pasteable.

variables.name: Auto-Start Run
variables.description: 1 = the coordinator launches the run automatically. 0 = the first player to join (the session admin) presses START from their in-game host controls.

variables.name: Enemy HP Scaling / Player
variables.description: Enemy max-health multiplier added per connected player (1 + value*players), fixed at run start. Mod config key EnemyHealthScalePerPlayer. Default 0.25.

variables.name: Coin Despawn (seconds)
variables.description: How long dropped gold coins persist before expiring. Mod config key CoinDespawnSeconds. Default 45.

variables.name: Mod Version Policy
variables.description: How joiners with a mismatched mod version are handled. Reject = refuse the join (recommended). Warn = allow but log a warning.

variables.name: Admin Command File
variables.description: 1 = watch BepInEx/plugins/PunkMultiverse/devcmd.txt so an operator can inject dev/admin commands (spawn, status, roster, etc.) at runtime. 0 = disabled.

variables.name: Sync Diagnostics
variables.description: 1 = verbose [Diag] sync/authority logging (useful when debugging desync). 0 = quiet.

variables.name: Stop Grace (seconds)
variables.description: On Stop, seconds to wait for the game to flush its save and exit cleanly before Wine is force-killed.

variables.name: Steam App ID
variables.description: PUNK Playtest appid, written to steam_appid.txt so the base game does not relaunch through the Steam client. Change only if the playtest appid changes.

variables.name: Wine Debug
variables.description: WINEDEBUG channel setting. Default -all (silent). Use e.g. +err,+warn to diagnose Wine issues.

variables.name: Extra Launch Args
variables.description: Additional arguments appended to the Punk.exe command line (Unity/Punk flags).
